column1: Marketing funnel: 8,000 MQLs → 842 closed deals (10.53% conversion rate)
Top lead source by volume: organic_search (28.7% of all MQLs)
Highest conversion among tracked channels: paid_search (12.3% conversion rate)
Dominant lead type: online_medium (39.43% of closed deals)
Primary business type: reseller (69.71% of closed deals)
Conversion cycle: avg 48.5 days, median 14.0 days
Fast conversion: 65.9% deals closed within 30 days
Seller activation rate: 45.1% (380 of 842 sellers have orders)
Total GMV from closed sellers: R$775,815.63
High conversion + high value channels: organic_search, paid_search, referral (based on median thresholds: Conversion ≥7%, GMV ≥R$753)
Top activation channels: direct_traffic, paid_search, other (activation rate >50%)
Low conversion channels needing optimization: email, other_publicities, display (conversion <7%)
